code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut out = ""
mut tok = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if not string.is_empty(tok)
      out = "#{out}#{tok} #{tok} "
      tok = ""
    end
  else
    tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(tok)
  out = "#{out}#{tok} #{tok} "
end
let outlen = string.len(out)
let final = if outlen > 0
  string.substring(out, 0, outlen - 1)
else
  ""
end
println(final)
